       "Call:\n",

       "TitleRare    -3.338461   0.788753  -4.233 2.31e-05 ***\n",

     },
     "metadata": {
      "image/png": {
       "height": 420,
       "width": 420
      }
     },
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# # 🚢 Titanic Survival Prediction — R Analysis\n",
    "#\n",
    "# **Author:** Dean Wang (deanbatur)\n",
    "# **Competition:** Titanic - Machine Learning from Disaster\n",
    "# **Task:** Binary Classification — Predict survival\n",
    "# **Metric:** Accuracy\n",
    "#\n",
    "# Clean R solution using tidyverse + randomForest.\n",
    "\n",
    "# ── Libraries ──\n",
    "library(tidyverse)\n",
    "\n",
    "if (!require(randomForest)) {\n",
    "  install.packages(\"randomForest\", repos = \"https://cran.r-project.org\")\n",
    "  library(randomForest)\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "set.seed(42)\n",
    "\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "# 1. Load Data\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "\n",
    "train <- read.csv(\"/kaggle/input/competitions/titanic/train.csv\", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)\n",
    "test  <- read.csv(\"/kaggle/input/competitions/titanic/test.csv\", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)\n",
    "\n",
    "cat(\"Train:\", nrow(train), \"rows,\", ncol(train), \"cols\\n\")\n",
    "cat(\"Test: \", nrow(test), \"rows,\", ncol(test), \"cols\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "str(train)\n",
    "summary(train)\n",
    "\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "# 2. Exploratory Data Analysis\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "\n",
    "cat(\"Overall survival rate:\", round(mean(train$Survived), 3), \"\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Survival by Sex\n",
    "p1 <- ggplot(train, aes(x = factor(Sex), fill = factor(Survived))) +\n",
    "  geom_bar(position = \"fill\") +\n",
    "  scale_fill_manual(values = c(\"#e74c3c\", \"#2ecc71\"), labels = c(\"Died\", \"Survived\")) +\n",
    "  labs(title = \"Survival by Sex\", x = \"Sex\", y = \"Proportion\", fill = \"Outcome\") +\n",
    "  theme_minimal()\n",
    "print(p1)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Survival by Pclass\n",
    "p2 <- ggplot(train, aes(x = factor(Pclass), fill = factor(Survived))) +\n",
    "  geom_bar(position = \"fill\") +\n",
    "  scale_fill_manual(values = c(\"#e74c3c\", \"#2ecc71\"), labels = c(\"Died\", \"Survived\")) +\n",
    "  labs(title = \"Survival by Class\", x = \"Passenger Class\", y = \"Proportion\", fill = \"Outcome\") +\n",
    "  theme_minimal()\n",
    "print(p2)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Age distribution\n",
    "p3 <- ggplot(train %>% filter(!is.na(Age)), aes(x = Age, fill = factor(Survived))) +\n",
    "  geom_histogram(bins = 30, alpha = 0.7, position = \"identity\") +\n",
    "  scale_fill_manual(values = c(\"#e74c3c\", \"#2ecc71\"), labels = c(\"Died\", \"Survived\")) +\n",
    "  labs(title = \"Age Distribution by Survival\", x = \"Age\", y = \"Count\", fill = \"Outcome\") +\n",
    "  theme_minimal()\n",
    "print(p3)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Missing Values\n",
    "missing <- colSums(is.na(train))\n",
    "cat(\"\\nMissing values:\\n\")\n",
    "print(missing[missing > 0])\n",
    "\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "# 3. Feature Engineering\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "\n",
    "engineer_features <- function(df) {\n",
    "  # Title extraction from Name\n",
    "  df$Title <- gsub(\"(.*, )|(\\\\..*)\", \"\", df$Name)\n",
    "\n",
    "  # Group rare titles\n",
    "  rare_titles <- c(\"Capt\", \"Col\", \"Don\", \"Dona\", \"Dr\", \"Jonkheer\",\n",
    "                    \"Lady\", \"Major\", \"Rev\", \"Sir\", \"the Countess\")\n",
    "  df$Title[df$Title %in% rare_titles] <- \"Rare\"\n",
    "  df$Title[df$Title == \"Mlle\"] <- \"Miss\"\n",
    "  df$Title[df$Title == \"Ms\"]   <- \"Miss\"\n",
    "  df$Title[df$Title == \"Mme\"]  <- \"Mrs\"\n",
    "\n",
    "  # Family size\n",
    "  df$FamilySize <- df$SibSp + df$Parch + 1\n",
    "  df$IsAlone    <- ifelse(df$FamilySize == 1, 1, 0)\n",
    "\n",
    "  # Fill missing Age with median by Title\n",
    "  for (t in unique(df$Title)) {\n",
    "    median_age <- median(df$Age[df$Title == t], na.rm = TRUE)\n",
    "    df$Age[df$Title == t & is.na(df$Age)] <- median_age\n",
    "  }\n",
    "\n",
    "  # Fill missing Embarked with mode\n",
    "  if (any(df$Embarked == \"\" | is.na(df$Embarked))) {\n",
    "    mode_embarked <- names(sort(table(df$Embarked[df$Embarked != \"\"]), decreasing = TRUE))[1]\n",
    "    df$Embarked[df$Embarked == \"\" | is.na(df$Embarked)] <- mode_embarked\n",
    "  }\n",
    "\n",
    "  # Fill missing Fare with median\n",
    "  df$Fare[is.na(df$Fare)] <- median(df$Fare, na.rm = TRUE)\n",
    "\n",
    "  # Convert to factors\n",
    "  df$Sex      <- as.factor(df$Sex)\n",
    "  df$Embarked <- as.factor(df$Embarked)\n",
    "  df$Title    <- as.factor(df$Title)\n",
    "  df$Pclass   <- as.factor(df$Pclass)\n",
    "\n",
    "  return(df)\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "train <- engineer_features(train)\n",
    "test  <- engineer_features(test)\n",
    "\n",
    "cat(\"Features engineered successfully.\\n\")\n",
    "cat(\"\\nTitle distribution:\\n\")\n",
    "print(table(train$Title))\n",
    "\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "# 4. Model Training\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "\n",
    "features <- c(\"Pclass\", \"Sex\", \"Age\", \"Fare\", \"Embarked\",\n",
    "              \"Title\", \"FamilySize\", \"IsAlone\")\n",
    "\n",
    "train$Survived <- as.factor(train$Survived)\n",
    "\n",
    "X_train <- train[, features]\n",
    "y_train <- train$Survived\n",
    "X_test  <- test[, features]\n",
    "\n",
    "# ── 4a. Logistic Regression ──\n",
    "cat(\"\\n══ Logistic Regression ══\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "lr_model <- glm(Survived ~ ., data = cbind(X_train, Survived = y_train),\n",
    "                family = binomial(link = \"logit\"))\n",
    "\n",
    "summary(lr_model)\n",
    "\n",
    "lr_probs <- predict(lr_model, X_train, type = \"response\")\n",
    "lr_preds <- ifelse(lr_probs > 0.5, 1, 0)\n",
    "lr_acc   <- mean(lr_preds == as.numeric(as.character(y_train)))\n",
    "cat(\"Logistic Regression Training Accuracy:\", round(lr_acc, 4), \"\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# ── 4b. Random Forest ──\n",
    "cat(\"\\n══ Random Forest ══\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "rf_model <- randomForest(\n",
    "  x = X_train,\n",
    "  y = y_train,\n",
    "  ntree = 500,\n",
    "  mtry = 3,\n",
    "  importance = TRUE\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(rf_model)\n",
    "\n",
    "rf_preds <- predict(rf_model, X_train)\n",
    "rf_acc   <- mean(rf_preds == y_train)\n",
    "cat(\"Random Forest Training Accuracy:\", round(rf_acc, 4), \"\\n\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Feature Importance\n",
    "importance_df <- as.data.frame(importance(rf_model))\n",
    "importance_df$Feature <- rownames(importance_df)\n",
    "\n",
    "p5 <- ggplot(importance_df, aes(x = reorder(Feature, MeanDecreaseGini),\n",
    "                                y = MeanDecreaseGini)) +\n",
    "  geom_col(fill = \"#3498db\") +\n",
    "  coord_flip() +\n",
    "  labs(title = \"Random Forest — Feature Importance\",\n",
    "       x = \"Feature\", y = \"Mean Decrease in Gini\") +\n",
    "  theme_minimal()\n",
    "print(p5)\n",
    "\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "# 5. Generate Submission\n",
    "# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n",
    "\n",
    "test_preds <- predict(rf_model, X_test)\n",
    "\n",
    "submission <- data.frame(\n",
    "  PassengerId = test$PassengerId,\n",
    "  Survived = as.integer(as.character(test_preds))\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "write.csv(submission, \"submission.csv\", row.names = FALSE)\n",
    "\n",
    "cat(\"\\nSubmission file created:\", nrow(submission), \"predictions\\n\")\n",
    "head(submission, 10)\n",
    "\n",
    "cat(\"\\n══ Done! ══\\n\")\n"
   ]
  },
